proposal_text:
Title: Memory Forensics
Concept: Unravel secrets from the past by diving into forgotten memories, and heal fractured communities through empathy and emotional truth.
Website Product Description: Step into the shoes of a unique investigator in "Memory Forensics," where solving crimes means more than just finding clues. Instead of cold facts, you'll delve into the emotional imprints left behind on everyday objects. Touch a forgotten toy, a worn letter, or a faded photograph, and be transported into a vivid "memory echo" – fragmented recollections of past events and the feelings of those involved. Your mission is to piece together these emotional puzzles, understanding the deep-seated discord that tore relationships apart. Every choice you make, every perspective you uncover, will directly influence the fragile bonds of the community, leading to profound consequences. Will your empathy bring closure and reconciliation, or will hidden truths cause further division? Experience a truly unique detective journey that prioritizes emotional depth, player connection to characters' pasts, and the powerful satisfaction of bringing understanding and healing to a troubled world.

Title: Veil of the New Dawn
Concept: Survive the Ruin. Forge the Future.
Website Product Description: Step into a world reborn, not just ruined. "Veil of the New Dawn" invites you to a post-apocalyptic future unlike any other, where a mysterious global phenomenon known as the "Veil" has transformed the planet. What was once desolate is now a breathtaking canvas of vibrant, magical nature and impossible, living ecosystems. This isn't just a fight for survival; it's an epic journey to cultivate tomorrow.

As a pioneer of this reshaped world, you will explore constantly evolving environments, each brimming with unique challenges and wonders, dynamically shaped by the Veil's unpredictable power. Master the art of adapting to nature's new rules, and learn how to strategically interact with the Veil itself to protect your settlements and foster growth. Your choices matter deeply here. Every decision, from how you manage resources to how you navigate complex ethical dilemmas within nascent communities, will have lasting consequences, shaping the very fabric of a new civilization. Will you lead humanity towards a future of hope and rebirth, or will your actions pave a different path? Discover the profound responsibility and intricate challenge of building a legacy in a world yearning for its new dawn.
